jobs.name: openrouter-watchdog
jobs.description: Frequent OpenRouter watchdog. Collects state without using the LLM.

jobs.name: openrouter-anomaly-analyzer
jobs.description: Runs only when anomaly data exists and produces a short operator-facing explanation.

jobs.name: openrouter-daily-brief
jobs.description: Optional daily summary report. Enable only if the owner wants this feature.
